## Security And Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No subscription URLs, tokens, controller secrets, raw credentials, or private logs are committed.
- [ ] Privileged operations still go through `badvpn-agent`.
- [ ] Mihomo controller remains localhost-only unless explicitly approved.
- [ ] Runtime downloads or updates remain signed, hash-pinned, atomic, and rollback-capable.
